title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Accor India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Accor India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Accor India! We are hiring a Hotel Manager for our Faridabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Accor India:
Accor India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accor India!
